hindi: रत्नैः कल्पितमासनं हिमजलैः स्नानं च दिव्याम्बरं,
english: A seat made of jewels, a bath with Himalayan waters, divine garments
roman: Ratnaih kalpitam asanam hima jalaih snanam cha divyambaram

english: Adorned with various gems, sandal paste fragrant with musk
roman: Nana ratna vibhushitam mrigamada modankitam chandanam

english: Flowers arranged from jasmine, champaka and bilva leaves, and incense
roman: Jati champaka bilvapattra rachitam pushpam cha dhupam tatha

hindi: दीपं देव दयानिधे पशुपते हृत्कल्पितं गृह्यताम्॥
english: O compassionate Lord, O Pashupati — please accept this lamp, all visualised in my heart
roman: Dipam deva dayanidhe Pashupate hrit kalpitam grihyatam

english: In a golden vessel set with pieces of nine gems — ghee and payasam
roman: Souvarne nava ratna khanda rachite patre ghritam payasam

english: Five kinds of food, milk, curd, banana fruit and a drink
roman: Bhakshyam pancha vidham payo dadhi yutam rambha phalam panakam

english: A myriad of vegetables, palatable water, a gleaming piece of camphor
roman: Shakanam ayutam jalam ruchi karam karpura khanda ujjvalam

hindi: ताम्बूलं मनसा मया विरचितं भक्त्या प्रभो स्वीकुरु॥
english: And betel leaf — all this mentally prepared by me — O Lord, accept it with devotion
roman: Tambulam manasa maya virachitam bhaktya Prabho svikuru

hindi: आत्मा त्वं गिरिजा मतिः सहचराः प्राणाः शरीरं गृहम्,
english: You are my self, Girija is my intellect, companions are my vital airs, body is my home
roman: Atma tvam Girija matih sahacharah pranah shareeram griham

english: My worship is enjoying sense objects, my sleep is the state of deep absorption
roman: Puja te vishaya upabhoga rachana nidra samadhi sthitih

hindi: सञ्चारः पदयोः प्रदक्षिणविधिः स्तोत्राणि सर्वा गिरो,
english: My walking is circumambulation, all my speech is your praise
roman: Sancharah padayoh pradakshina vidhih stotrani sarva girah

english: Whatever action I perform, all of it entirely is worship of you O Shambhu
roman: Yadyat karma karomi tattad akhilam Shambho tavaaradhanam
